channel.title: JLT Pillar Posts
channel.description: In-depth pillar posts from Janine Loves Travel — authority content for JLT agents and travellers

item.title: Not every "travel agent from home" opportunity is the same thing. 🕶️
item.description:
Not every "travel agent from home" opportunity is the same thing. 🕶️
Some are built around selling holidays. The agent earns from each booking, clean and professional. Others are built around recruitment, where the team you bring in does the heavy lifting on income.
One question tells you which is which. "If I never recruit a single person and only sell holidays, what does my income look like?" A genuine host agency answers that with numbers tied to bookings. If the answer circles back to team-building or downlines, that tells you what the model is built around. 👣
Real UK host agencies sit on supplier relationships, ATOL protection, a proper booking platform, and training that takes months, not days.
Five specific red flags worth knowing on the blog.
Full blog on the website… link in the comments 🔗
First comment: https://janinelovestravel.co.uk/travel-agent-from-home-mlm-how-to-tell
